issue_title: Infinite loop using tanstack router preload "viewport" and params
issue_body_preview:
## Context

What's your version of `nuqs`?

```
"nuqs": "^2.8.9"
```

What framework are you using?

<!-- Keep whichever is relevant (✅: used, ❌ not used) -->

- ✅ TanStack Router

Which version of your framework are you using?
```
"@tanstack/react-router": "^1.166.7"
```

## Description

Using Tans
test_description_zh: 在使用 TanStack Router 且配置了 preload='viewport' 的页面中，设置 nuqs 的搜索参数（useQueryState），观察页面是否能正常渲染和交互，检查浏览器控制台是否出现无限循环或页面卡死的情况。
expected_result_zh: 页面正常渲染，搜索参数能正确读写，不会出现无限循环导致的页面卡死或浏览器无响应现象。
